title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Special Protection Group Act, 1988. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st August, 1988, vide notification No. S.O. 735(E), dated 1st August, 1988, See Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
